title: Is it possible to auto-populate use a user's profile title to using a variable when automating an update?
excerpt: Hi, we have created an update on an item when a status changes, we are using the variable {user.name} to sign off with, but we would also like to add the users title which is setup in each users profile. there is no pre-…

posts.author: czabbal (CZ)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we have created an update on an item when a status changes, we are using the variable {user.name} to sign off with, but we would also like to add the users title which is setup in each users profile. there is no pre-defined variable in the list for title…wondering if this is possible?
thanks

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @czabbal, good question!

At the moment there’s no way to pull in information from the user’s profile to an update/something in the board. The title would have to be reflected in the board somehow (like in a column). Let me know if you have any other questions!
